Matches.Description: The 1st Test of the New Zealand Tour of England 2026 marks the start of a three match Test series. Watch England vs New Zealand 1st Test live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked red-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, England cricket team focusing on balance and pace control. New Zealand, led by Tom Latham, rely on experienced players such as Kane Williamson & Devon Conway to apply early pressure and dominate key phases.

The 1st Test of the Afghanistan Tour of India 2026 marks the start of a only Test match. Watch India vs Afghanistan 1st Test live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked red-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, India will look to make the most of home conditions with a well-balanced squad, while Afghanistan aim to challenge with a disciplined unit capable of competing in all aspects of the game. Both teams will be eager to gain an early advantage in the series.
